data.name: DragonStone Revenge
data.detailed_description:
Step into the wild and war-torn realm of Eldenwood, a land gripped by tyranny, temptation, and ancient power. In DragonStone Revenge, you play as Myranda, a fierce and cunning warrior maiden with a mysterious past and a blade sharpened by vengeance.

Raised in the shadows of King’s Landing and exiled by betrayal, Myranda returns to a fractured world—one ruled by corrupt nobles, dark rituals, and creatures born from forgotten magic. As the last living heir to a legendary bloodline, she alone can unlock the power of the DragonStone, a mythical artifact said to control the fate of the land.

But power comes with a price.

FEATURES

🔥 Mature, Story-Driven Gameplay
Make bold choices in a rich, branching narrative filled with betrayal, seduction, revenge, and redemption. Every decision Myranda makes changes her relationships—and the outcome of the war.

🌍 Expansive Open World
From the cursed ruins of Hollowshade to the decadent halls of Goldspire Keep, explore dozens of hand-crafted locations teeming with secrets, side quests, and dangerous beauty.

⚔️ Dynamic Combat System
Master a fluid and deadly combat system that blends swordplay, stealth, and forbidden magic. Upgrade your abilities and forge unique gear as you battle beasts, traitors, and tyrants.

❤️ Romance & Intrigue
Forge alliances or manipulate them. Choose your lovers wisely—noble knights, rogue witches, and dangerous enemies await. Intimacy opens doors… and sometimes traps.

🐉 Unleash the Dragon Within
Awaken the legacy buried in Myranda’s blood. As the DragonStone begins to respond to her will, a darker, more powerful side of her is revealed. Will you control it—or be consumed by it?

NOT JUST A FIGHT FOR SURVIVAL…
IT'S A FIGHT TO CLAIM YOUR DESTINY.

Myranda’s revenge has just begun. Are you ready to light the fire?

🛡️ Coming soon. Wishlist now and prepare to enter Eldenwood.

data.short_description: Mature-Themed Open World RPG | Explore. Seduce. Survive. In DragonStone Revenge, you play as Myranda, a fierce and cunning warrior maiden with a mysterious past and a blade sharpened by vengeance.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 15 Sequoia, macOS 14 Sonoma, and macOS 13 Ventura
  • 處理器: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 15 Sequoia, macOS 14 Sonoma, and macOS 13 Ventura
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: integrated or higher

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: 1.8 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce 1080 and higher ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: integrated or higher

  • Processor: 2.4 Ghz equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1080 equivalent or greater ; ATI radeon RX and higher
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: integrated or higher
